provenance.source: Hand-authored for toolcall-repair-bench; models the python_call_syntax failure shape common to small local models.

request_tools.name: get_stock_price
request_tools.description: Get the price of a stock over a period.

note: The model emitted a Python-style function call; the callee maps to the tool name and the keyword arguments map directly to symbol and period, both copied verbatim.
